name: Alex Cuba
description:
'''Alexis Puentes''' (born 1974), better known by his stage name '''Alex Cuba''', is a Cuban-Canadian singer-songwriter who sings in Spanish and English. He has won three [[Juno Award]]s in his career, with two wins for [[Juno Award for World Music Album of the Year|World Music Album of the Year]] in 2006 for ''[[Humo de Tabaco]]'', and in 2008 for his second album, ''[[Agua del Pozo]]'', and one win for [[Juno Award for Latin Music Recording of the Year|Latin Music Recording of the Year]] in 2026 for ''Índole''.

In 2010 he won the [[Latin Grammy]] for Best New Artist. His 2015 album, ''Healer'', earned him a [[Latin Grammy Award for Best Singer-Songwriter Album]] and a [[Grammy Award]] nomination for [[Grammy Award for Best Latin Pop Album|Best Latin Pop Album]]. His 2021 album ''[[Mendó]]'' won the 2022 Grammy for Best Latin Pop Album.
